creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
On 2 Jun 2009, at 17:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-threads-shared,
>
> Please note that PR ports/135180 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Nothing special as it looks like from the change log, approved

thanks for submitting!

>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135180
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
